name: f1-race-replay
description: F1 Race Replay - Formula 1 Race Visualization with Go Backend // Interactive 3D race telemetry and analysis

scripts.build:go: cd go-backend && go build -o f1-replay-go . && echo '✓ Go binary built successfully'
scripts.build:go:quick: cd go-backend && [ -f f1-replay-go ] && echo '✓ Go binary exists, skipping rebuild' || (go build -o f1-replay-go . && echo '✓ Go binary built successfully') || exit 1
scripts.build: npm run build:go && npm run build:frontend
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:go && node dev.js
scripts.lint:go: cd go-backend && go vet ./... && go fmt ./...
